content.speakerText: We crushed that project—thanks everyone for pulling through!
content.speakerTextCn: 咱们把项目搞定了！感谢大家的全力付出！

options.text: No problem! Happy we nailed it.
I'm tired, let's just go home.
Actually, I think we could have done better.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem! Happy we nailed it.' 是积极、感恩且符合团队氛围的回应。干扰项 'I'm tired...' 表达消极情绪，不符合致谢场景；'I think we could have done better.' 消极评价团队成果，破坏气氛；'Who even worked on this?' 显得冷漠且不尊重团队努力。

content.speakerText: Let’s celebrate with coffee next week?
content.speakerTextCn: 下周一起喝杯咖啡庆祝一下？

options.text: Love that idea—I’ll pick the spot!
Why are we celebrating? We barely made the deadline.
Can we do it next year instead?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Love that idea—I’ll pick the spot!' 是积极、主动且增强团队凝聚力的回应。干扰项 'I don't like coffee.' 忽略了提议的象征意义（庆祝），过于字面；'We barely made the deadline.' 否定项目成果，破坏氛围；'next year' 延迟庆祝，显得冷漠不配合。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate how you handled the client feedback—your calmness saved the day.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感激你处理客户反馈的方式，你的冷静挽救了局面。

options.text: Thanks, I just did my job.
That means a lot—I’m glad I could help.
Actually, Sarah did most of the work.
I didn’t think it was that big of a deal.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'That means a lot—I’m glad I could help.' 既接受感谢，又谦逊回应，体现专业与团队精神。干扰项 'I just did my job.' 虽看似谦虚，但弱化了对方的认可；'Actually, Sarah...' 转移功劳，可能引发团队矛盾；'I didn’t think it was that big...' 否定对方的评价，显得不领情。

content.template: Thanks for leading us so well—you made it ___!
content.hint: 表达感谢时常用句型，强调对方的帮助让任务更顺利
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：make it easy（让事情变轻松）

content.template: I’d love to celebrate—___ pick the café?
content.hint: 主动提出承担安排，体现积极态度
content.knowledgePoint: 主动提议句型：let me + 动词（表达自愿承担）

content.template: I really appreciate your ___ during the final sprint.
content.hint: 表达感谢时，描述对方的具体品质或行为
content.knowledgePoint: 职场致谢高频词汇：dedication, effort, commitment

content.speakerText: We crushed that project—thanks everyone for pulling through!
content.speakerTextCn: 咱们把项目搞定了！感谢大家的全力付出！
expectedAnswers: No problem! Happy we nailed it.
Thanks for all your hard work—I couldn’t have done it without you.
Really appreciate everyone stepping up. Let’s celebrate soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了对团队的感谢和认可
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，语气真诚
关键词覆盖：使用了如 'appreciate', 'hard work', 'team', 'celebrate' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Let’s celebrate with coffee next week?
content.speakerTextCn: 下周一起喝杯咖啡庆祝一下？
expectedAnswers: Love that idea! I’ll book the table and pick a cozy spot.
Definitely! How about we make it a team lunch instead?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应庆祝提议，表达参与意愿
语言准确性：语法正确，用词自然，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气热情、符合职场社交习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了如 'celebrate', 'coffee', 'team', 'pick a spot' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I want to recognize your amazing work on the client presentation—it was flawless.
content.speakerTextCn: 我想特别感谢你在客户演示中的出色表现——完美无瑕。
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much—I really appreciate you noticing that!
Thanks! I put a lot of effort into it, and the team’s support made it possible.
I’m glad it landed well. We all worked hard together, and I’m proud of what we did.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否得体回应认可，既表达感谢又不自夸
语言准确性：语法正确，用词专业，无错误表达
表达自然度：语气真诚、谦逊，符合职场文化
关键词覆盖：使用了如 'recognize', 'appreciate', 'team', 'effort', 'proud' 等关键词
